revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template generates an external link from a [[:en:Persistent identifier|Persistent identifier]] for a metadata entry within the [[Japan Center for Asian Historical Records]] (JACAR), a part of the [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]]. == Usage == Standard usage as a citation is: {{JACAR|ID|Title}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|title=Title|editor=Editor}} To generate only the URL: {{JACAR|ID|plainurl=1}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|plainurl=1}} For compatibility with the Japanese version of this template, {{JACAR|ID|Title|1}} generates a less verbose link. The ID is the key for the item found in the URL https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/MetSearch.cgi?IS_KEY_S1=ID&SUM_KIND=SimpleSummary&IS_KIND=detail&IS_SCH=META&IS_STYLE=... == Examples == *{{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} == See also == *{{tl|NDLPID}} *{{tl|JPNO}} == External links == * [https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/reference-en Search by Reference Code] Japan Center for Asian Historical Records (JACAR), National Archives of Japan {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template generates an external link from a [[:en:Persistent identifier|Persistent identifier]] for a metadata entry within the [[Japan Center for Asian Historical Records]] (JACAR), a part of the [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]]. == Usage == Standard usage as a citation is: {{JACAR|ID|Title}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|title=Title|editor=Editor}} To generate only the URL: {{JACAR|ID|plainurl=1}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|plainurl=1}} For compatibility with the Japanese version of this template, {{JACAR|ID|Title|1}} generates a less verbose link. The ID is the key for the item found in the URL https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/MetSearch.cgi?IS_KEY_S1=ID&SUM_KIND=SimpleSummary&IS_KIND=detail&IS_SCH=META&IS_STYLE=... == Examples == *{{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} == See also == *{{tl|NDLPID}} *{{tl|JPNO}} == External links == * [https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/reference-en Search by Reference Code] Japan Center for Asian Historical Records (JACAR), National Archives of Japan {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template generates an external link from a [[:en:Persistent identifier|Persistent identifier]] for a metadata entry within the [[Japan Center for Asian Historical Records]] (JACAR), a part of the [[:en:National Archives of Japan|National Archives of Japan]]. == Usage == Standard usage as a citation is: {{JACAR|ID|Title}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|title=Title|editor=Editor}} To generate only the URL: {{JACAR|ID|plainurl=1}} or {{JACAR|id=ID|plainurl=1}} For compatibility with the Japanese version of this template, {{JACAR|ID|Title|1}} generates a less verbose link. The ID is the key for the item found in the URL https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/MetSearch.cgi?IS_KEY_S1=ID&SUM_KIND=SimpleSummary&IS_KIND=detail&IS_SCH=META&IS_STYLE=... == Examples == *{{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|plainurl=1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件|1}} *{{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} → {{JACAR|A10110299500|故上杉輝虎外四名贈位ノ件}} == See also == *{{tl|NDLPID}} *{{tl|JPNO}} == External links == * [https://www.jacar.archives.go.jp/aj/meta/reference-en Search by Reference Code] Japan Center for Asian Historical Records (JACAR), National Archives of Japan {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
